Microsoft Power Automate documentation

Create automated workflows between apps and services to synchronize files, get notifications, collect data, and more.

Sections:
- Create and design
  - Try/Buy Power Automate
  - Create flows: Automated, Scheduled, Desktop flows
  - AI copilot: Copilot in cloud flows, Process Mining, desktop flows
  - Process mining: Process Mining overview, Power Automate Process Mining (Minit), Task mining
  - Solutions: Distribute flows, Create cloud flow in solution, ALM
  - Integrate: Teams, SharePoint, Email
  - Best practices: Plan a project, Automation Kit, Automation adoption

- Administer and extend
  - Power Platform admin center
  - Environments and resources
  - Data loss prevention policies
  - Enterprise developer/ISV/partner guide
  - Cloud flows via code
  - Desktop flows via code
  - Custom connectors

- Use
  - Dataverse: Add/delete rows, upload/download files
  - Teams, SharePoint, Email, Forms, Approvals
  - Business process flows

Updated: 2026-03-26
